posts.author: JohnWang234 (John Wang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request to have an option to save view filters per board that does not affect everyone.

I have a specific view I use to view my departments progress. spoke with a live chat rep and they told me that if I save the view everyone in the board will see my saved. hope we can have an option to have our own saved views so we dont have to bother other people in the board.

also even if i just open the same board on the new tab the filters reset. so its very troublesome. thank you
